---
title: "Queen Quality"
author: "Dylan Ryals"
date: "2026-02-06"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Genomic Selection from skim-seq of queens and phenotypic records

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(Matrix)
library(cowplot)
library(readxl)
library(corrplot)
library(ggrepel)

select = dplyr::select
rename = dplyr::rename
theme_set(theme_bw())

setwd("/home/dylan/Documents/bees/harpurlab/project/gensel/tarpy/queen-quality")
```


read in data and manipulate
```{r}
#TODO: adjust phenotypes, perform GWAS with GRM and PCA?
#TODO: calcualte G following van raiden ...
#TODO: account for admixture components? ancestry?
#TODO: enaure all samples are accounted for!


#read phenotypic data
pheno = read_excel("data/phenotypes.xlsx") %>% 
  mutate(id = gsub(" ", "", QC))
#standardize locations
loc.trans = data.frame(Location = c("Hawaii", "Georgia", "Southern California", "Minnesota",
                                    "Northern California", "Washington", "West Virginia",
                                    "Michigan", "Unknown", "NCA", "NC", "USA", "MN", 
                                    "GA", "HI", "PA", "CA", "OH", "NY", "WA", "SCA",
                                    "VA", "AL", "FL", "OR"), 
                       
                       loc.fix = c("HI", "GA", "SCA", "MN",
                                   "NCA", "WA", "WV",
                                   "MI", "USA", "NCA", "NC", "USA", "MN", 
                                   "GA", "HI", "PA", "CA", "OH", "NY", "WA", "SCA",
                                   "VA", "AL", "FL", "OR"))
pheno = pheno %>% left_join(loc.trans)

#remove duplicate second entry
pheno = pheno[-(which(pheno$id == "QC2573")[2]),]

#genotype PCA
  eig = read.delim("data/samples-pca.eigenval", header = F)
    eig$perc = eig$V1 / sum(eig$V1)
    eig$x = 1:nrow(eig)
    
    eig %>% filter(x < 25) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(y = perc, x = x)) + geom_col()

  pca.geno = read.delim("data/samples-pca.eigenvec", header = F, sep = "")[,c(1,3:5)]
    colnames(pca.geno) = c("id", "PC1", "PC2", "PC3")
    
    pca.geno = pca.geno %>% left_join(pheno %>% select(id, loc.fix))
  
    ggplot(pca.geno, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = loc.fix)) + geom_point()
    

#phenotype PCA
  pheno.num = pheno %>% 
    select(m.Body, v.Sperm, l.Sperm, t.Sperm, w.Head, w.Thorax, d.Spermatheca) %>% 
    as.matrix() %>% apply(MARGIN = 2, FUN = as.numeric)p
  
  pheno.num %>% cor(use = 'complete.obs') %>% corrplot()
  
  pheno.scale = pheno.num %>% apply(MARGIN = 2, FUN = scale)
  pheno.scale[is.na(pheno.scale)] = 0
  

  pca.pheno = pheno.scale %>% 
    prcomp(center = F, scale = F) 
  
  biplot(pca.pheno)

#GWAS  
  #viability
  v.mlma = read.delim("data/qq_vsperm.mlma", sep = "")
  v.mlma$padj = p.adjust(v.mlma$p, method = "bonferroni", n = nrow(v.mlma))
  v.mlma$logp = log(v.mlma$padj, base = 10)* -1
  v.mlma$lograwp = log(v.mlma$p, base = 10) * -1

  # out = v.mlma %>% filter(padj < 0.05) %>% arrange(padj) %>%
  #   select(Chr, bp, A1, A2, p, padj)
  # 
  # write.csv(out, file = "data/viability_gwashits.csv", 
  #           row.names = F, quote = F)
  
  #hist(v.mlma$p)
  
  ggplot(v.mlma, aes(x = bp, y = lograwp)) + 
    geom_point() + 
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 
                     (-1 * log(0.05 / nrow(v.mlma), base = 10))),
                      #(-1 * log(0.05, base = 10))),
           linetype = 2, col = 'red') +
    facet_wrap(facets = vars(Chr), scales = "free_x") + 
    labs(title = "7a. GWAS: Viability", y = "-log(p)") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) format(x, scientific = TRUE))
    
    
  #weight
  w.mlma = read.delim("data/qq_weight.mlma", sep = "")
  w.mlma$padj = p.adjust(w.mlma$p, method = "bonferroni", n = nrow(w.mlma))
  w.mlma$logp = log(w.mlma$padj, base = 10)* -1
  w.mlma$lograwp = log(w.mlma$p, base = 10) * -1
  
  
  ggplot(w.mlma, aes(x = bp, y = lograwp)) + 
    geom_point() + 
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 
                     (-1 * log(0.05 / nrow(v.mlma), base = 10))),
                      #(-1 * log(0.05, base = 10))),
           linetype = 2, col = 'red') +
    facet_wrap(facets = vars(Chr), scales = "free_x") + 
    labs(title = "7a. GWAS: Weight", y = "-log(p)") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) format(x, scientific = TRUE))
  

  #total viable sperm
  l.mlma = read.delim("data/qq_vsperm.mlma", sep = "")
  l.mlma$padj = p.adjust(l.mlma$p, method = "bonferroni", n = nrow(l.mlma))
  l.mlma$logp = log(l.mlma$padj, base = 10)* -1
  l.mlma$lograwp = log(l.mlma$p, base = 10) * -1
  
  
  ggplot(l.mlma, aes(x = bp, y = lograwp)) + 
    geom_point() + 
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 
                     (-1 * log(0.05 / nrow(v.mlma), base = 10))),
                      #(-1 * log(0.05, base = 10))),
           linetype = 2, col = 'red') +
    facet_wrap(facets = vars(Chr), scales = "free_x") + 
    labs(title = "7a. GWAS: Total Viable Sperm", y = "-log(p)") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) format(x, scientific = TRUE))
  
  
```

Quick figs
```{r}
#genetic PCA
gpca = read.delim(paste0("data/", SET, ".eigenvec"),
                  sep = "", header = F)[,c(1, 3:5)]
  colnames(gpca) = c("vcf_id", "PC1", "PC2", "PC3")
  
  preblup = preblup %>% left_join(gpca)
  
  ggplot(preblup, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Location)) + 
    geom_point()

```



format for blup
```{r}
  blup_rename = function(v){
    u = unique(v[!is.na(v)])
    out = v
    for(i in 1:length(u)){
      out[v == u[i]] = i
    }
    return(as.numeric(out))
  }


pheno = preblup %>% 
  filter(vcf_id %in% colnames(G))

#cluster small sources
  pheno.cluster = pheno %>% group_by(Source) %>% 
    summarise(n = n()) %>% filter(n<4)
  
  pheno$source2 = pheno$Source
  pheno$source2[pheno$source2 %in% pheno.cluster$Source] = "Other"
  
  #summary(lm(weight ~ source, data = pheno))


#TODO: consider standardizing...
  
pheno = pheno %>% 
  select(vcf_id, source = source2, viability = `% Viability`, 
         weight = Weight, PC1, PC2) %>% 
  mutate(iid = 1:nrow(pheno),
         sid = blup_rename(source),
         viability = round(scale(as.numeric(viability))[,1], 4),
         #viability = round(as.numeric(viability), 4),
         weight = round(scale(weight)[,1], 4)
         #weight = round(weight, 4)
         )


#output for pheno
  pheno.out = pheno %>% 
    select(iid, sid, weight, viability, PC1, PC2)
  
  write.table(pheno.out, "blup/pheno.txt", 
              col.names = F, row.names = F, quote = F)
  
  #output matrix
  
  final.mat = G[pheno$vcf_id, pheno$vcf_id]
  
  N = dim(final.mat)[1]
  covmat = matrix(ncol = 3, nrow = (N*N-N)/2 + N)
  cmr = 0
  for(i in 1:N){
    for(j in 1:i){
      cmr = cmr +1
      covmat[cmr,] = c(i,j, final.mat[i,j])
    }
  }
  
  write.table(covmat, "blup/covmat.txt", row.names = F, col.names = F, sep = " ")
    max(covmat[,2])
  
sapply(pheno.out, max)
```


read results: quantitative
```{r}
#pull solutions: 2-trait
  sol = read.delim("blup/sol-1.txt", sep = "", header = F)[-1,]
    colnames(sol) = c("trait", "effect", "level" ,"solution", "se")
    sol = sol %>% mutate(se = as.numeric(se),
                         solution = as.numeric(solution))  

  sol.long = sol %>% 
    filter(effect == 1) %>% select(-effect) %>% rename(bv = solution) %>% 
    mutate(trait = recode(trait, `1` = "weight", `2` = "viability"))
  
  sol.long = sol.long %>% 
    left_join(pheno %>% select(level = iid, vcf_id) %>% 
                mutate(level = as.character(level)))
  
    sol.wide = sol.long %>%
    pivot_wider(values_from = c(se, bv), names_from = trait)

  sol.wide %>% select(starts_with("bv")) %>% pairs()

#plot against raw pheno
  
  pbv = sol.wide%>% 
    left_join(preblup %>% select(vcf_id, weight = Weight, viability = `% Viability`,
              Location, Source)) %>% 
    mutate(viability = as.numeric(viability))
  
#plotting BVs
  p6a = ggplot(pbv, aes(x = weight, y = bv_weight, color = Location,
                  ymax = bv_weight + se_weight, ymin = bv_weight - se_weight)) +
    geom_pointrange(size = 1) + 
    labs(title = "6a. Breeding Values")
  
  p6b = ggplot(pbv, aes(x = viability, y = bv_viability, color = Location,
                  ymax = bv_viability + se_viability, ymin = bv_viability - se_viability)) +
    geom_pointrange(size = 1) +
    labs(title = "6b. Breeding Values")
  
  pbv$toplabs = pbv$vcf_id
    pbv$toplabs[pbv$bv_viability < 0.25 | pbv$bv_weight < 0.18] = NA
  
  p6c = ggplot(pbv, aes(x = bv_weight, y = bv_viability, color = Location,
                  label = toplabs)) +
    geom_point(size = 3) + 
    geom_label_repel()+
    labs(title = "6c. Selection Candidates")
  
```


Selection Index ...
```{r}

```


Output for GWAS
```{r}
#adjust with lm
gwas = pheno %>% 
  left_join(preblup %>% select(PC1, PC2))

  summary(lm(weight ~ source + PC1 + PC2, data = gwas))

  gwas$adj.weight = lm(weight ~ source + PC1 + PC2, data = gwas)$residuals %>% 
    round(4)
  gwas$adj.viability = lm(viability ~ source + PC1 + PC2, data = gwas)$residuals %>% 
    round(4)

  #write out
  gwas.out = data.frame(fid = gwas$vcf_id, 
                        iid = gwas$vcf_id, 
                        weight = gwas$adj.weight, 
                        viability = gwas$adj.viability)
  write.table(file = "data/tarpy_weight.pheno",
              gwas.out %>% select(-viability),
              col.names = F, row.names = F, quote = F,
              sep = "\t")
    write.table(file = "data/tarpy_viability.pheno",
              gwas.out %>% select(-weight),
              col.names = F, row.names = F, quote = F,
              sep = "\t")
    
    
#read results
  #viability
  v.mlma = read.delim("data/tarpy_viability.mlma", sep = "")
  v.mlma$padj = p.adjust(v.mlma$p, method = "bonferroni", n = nrow(v.mlma))
  v.mlma$logp = log(v.mlma$padj, base = 10)* -1
  v.mlma$lograwp = log(v.mlma$p, base = 10) * -1
  
  hist(v.mlma$p)
  
  p7a = ggplot(v.mlma, aes(x = bp, y = lograwp)) + 
    geom_point() + 
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 
                     (-1 * log(0.05 / nrow(v.mlma), base = 10))),
                      #(-1 * log(0.05, base = 10))),
           linetype = 2, col = 'red') +
    facet_wrap(facets = vars(Chr), scales = "free") + 
    labs(title = "7a. GWAS: Viability", y = "-log(p)") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) format(x, scientific = TRUE))
    
    
  #weight
  w.mlma = read.delim("data/tarpy_weight.mlma", sep = "")
  w.mlma$padj = p.adjust(w.mlma$p, method = "bonferroni", n = nrow(w.mlma))
  w.mlma$logp = log(w.mlma$padj, base = 10)* -1
  w.mlma$lograwp = log(w.mlma$p, base = 10) * -1
  
  
  p7b = ggplot(w.mlma, aes(x = bp, y = lograwp)) + 
    geom_point() + 
    geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 
                     (-1 * log(0.05 / nrow(v.mlma), base = 10))),
                      #(-1 * log(0.05, base = 10))),
           linetype = 2, col = 'red') +
    facet_wrap(facets = vars(Chr), scales = "free") + 
    labs(title = "7a. GWAS: Weight", y = "-log(p)") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) format(x, scientific = TRUE))
  

qqPlot <- function(pval, truncate = FALSE, ylim=NULL, thinThreshold=NULL, ci=TRUE, ...) 
{
  # pvalue is a vector of p-values
  # truncate is T/F whether to truncate the y-axis (observed) to the same limits as the x-axis (expected)
  # thin is whether to thin insignificant p-values
  
  pval <- -log10(sort(pval)) # sort() removes NAs
  n <- length(pval)
  a <- 1:n
  b <- a/n
  x <- -log10(b)
  
  if (!is.null(thinThreshold)){
    breaks <- seq(from=0, to=thinThreshold, length.out=11)
    pval.cut <- cut(pval, breaks=breaks, right=FALSE)
    #quant <- quantile(pval[pval < thinThreshold], probs=1:10/10)
    #pval.cut <- cut(pval, breaks=c(0, quant), right=FALSE)
    ind.list <- list()
    for (level in levels(pval.cut)){
      sel <- which(pval.cut == level)
      ind.list[[level]] <- sel[sample.int(length(sel), min(1000, length(sel)))]
    }
    ind.list[["max"]] <- which(pval >= thinThreshold)
    ind <- unlist(ind.list, use.names=FALSE)
    ind <- sort(ind) # sorting necessary for polygon, below
  } else {
    ind <- 1:n
  }
  
  
  char <- rep(1,n)
  if(!is.logical(truncate) | truncate){
    if (is.logical(truncate)){
      maxx <- max(x)+2  
    } else {
      maxx <- min(truncate, max(pval))
    }
    
    ylm <- c(0,maxx)
    ylb <- expression(paste(-log[10], "(observed P) - truncated"))
    nx <- length(which(pval > maxx))
    if(nx > 0){
      pval[1:nx] <- maxx
      char[1:nx] <- 2
    }
    
  } else {
    ylm <- ylim
    ylb <- expression(paste(-log[10], "(observed P)"))
  }
  plot(x[ind], pval[ind], type = "n", ylim = ylm, ylab = ylb,
       xlab = expression(paste(-log[10], "(expected P)")), ...)
  # upper and lower have already been subset
  if (ci){
    upper <- qbeta(0.05, a[ind], rev(a)[ind])
    lower <- qbeta(0.95, a[ind], rev(a)[ind])

    polygon(-log10(c(b[ind], rev(b[ind]))), -log10(c(upper, rev(lower))), density=NA, col="gray")
  }
  points(x[ind], pval[ind], pch = 19, ...)  
  abline(0,1,col="red")  
}
    

qqPlot(v.mlma$p)
qqPlot(w.mlma$p)
```


Output all plots to PDF
```{r}
#save if everythign looks good
setwd("/home/dylan/Documents/bees/harpurlab/project/popgen/beekreports")
SUB = "Bradley Metz & David Tarpy"
SUB.nospace = gsub(" |[.] |[|]|[&]", "_", SUB)
system(paste0("mkdir -p ", SUB.nospace))


  
  pdf(paste0(SUB.nospace, "/combined2.pdf"),# File name
    width = 11, height = 8.5, # Width and height in inches
    bg = "white",
    paper = "USr",
    #paper = c(rep("US"))
    title = "Purdue Honey Bee Genomics Report")  
  
  biplot(pca)
  title(main = "5. Phenotype PCA", line = 2)
  p6a
  p6b
  p6c
  p7a
  p7b

  dev.off()  
  
  
```
